sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO timestamps (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, strptime('Wed, 1 January 1992 - 08:38:40 PST', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %H:%M:%S %Z'));
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = strptime('Thu, 2 January 1992 - 09:00:00 PST', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %H:%M:%S %Z') WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time > strptime('Tue, 1 January 1992 - 08:00:00 PST', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %H:%M:%S %Z');
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < strptime('Thu, 3 January 1992 - 10:00:00 PST', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %H:%M:%S %Z');
